about.title: About Me
about.bio: Full-stack software engineer with 4 years of professional experience at Cognizant. I've worked across the stack — React/TypeScript frontends, Node.js APIs, PostgreSQL, and AWS infrastructure. Lately I've been drawn to mobile: there's something satisfying about building an app and installing it straight on your phone. Looking to join a small or medium product company — Lithuanian products are a bonus, because building something I can see in my surroundings and meet the users of makes the work feel meaningful to me. I lean into AI tools as part of my workflow — I think knowing how to use them well is part of being a good engineer today. Outside of code, I'm a former street musician — these days I spend my time outdoors and taking care of my cat.

experience.title: Experience
experience.role1_desc:
Promoted to mid-level after one year. Worked across several projects.

On a large-scale e-commerce asset management platform: contributed to most of a new module's features, owned the integration between modules, and supported content upload and processing workflows for both internal users and external suppliers. Worked with React, Node, PostgreSQL, AWS, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Kafka, and Datadog.

On another PIM module: helped extend an existing system to support a new region — analyzed data discrepancies, built reports, and contributed to implementing the functionality.

On a travel industry API modernization: contributed to migrating AWS Lambda functions from JavaScript to TypeScript and adding test coverage. Also contributed to rewriting Python 2 PIM modules to Python 3 with CI/CD.
experience.role2_desc:
Started at Cognizant as a junior engineer across two projects.

On a finance loan management platform: built features with Angular, .NET and MySQL.

On the e-commerce asset management platform: built features, migrated the upload portal from Material UI to an internal component library, and improved accessibility.
experience.edu_desc: Studied software design, algorithms, data structures, databases, security, testing, and Agile practices. Worked on real projects individually and in teams, covering everything from mobile apps to complex systems. Awarded the KTU Talent Scholarship in 2022 for academic performance. Graduated with MindConnect — a mental health platform featuring mood tracking, therapist video scheduling, and real-time group chat.

projects.title: Personal Projects
projects.bachelor_desc: My bachelor's thesis project at KTU. I chose mental health as my theme because at the time I wanted to understand myself better and work on something that felt meaningful to me. Key features: journal, mood tracking, therapist appointment management, video calls, and group chat.
projects.project2_desc: A real-time music room app. The idea came when plug.dj was discontinued in 2021. Users create rooms, join live sessions, and manage a shared YouTube music queue. Room management, chat, and queue sync all run over WebSockets.
